release_notes:
## What's New

- Holy Communion weekly tracking added (nullable per week)

## Bug Fixes

- Syncfusion license key injection point prepared in app startup
- Optional PIN authentication added to admin profiles
- WeeklyEntryScreen now uses route arguments for church ID
- Baptisms column added to weekly records
- Dashboard now shows all church records by default
- Update manifest URL can be switched for debug builds
- Date validation allows up to 2 days in the future
- Added named routes for analytics and reports screens
- Chart widgets consolidated into lib/ui/widgets/charts
- PerformanceMonitor caps stored measurements and exposes clearAll()
- Pubspec description updated
